user.title: Connect to Converging Systems e-Node
user.description:
Enter the network settings for your e-Node gateway.

**Tip:** Use a static IP so the address never changes. Default Telnet port is 23.

data_description.host: The IP address of your e-Node on the local network

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the e-Node. Check the IP address, port, and that the device is powered on.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check your Home Assistant logs.
